segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: We, actually, actually, have no place in American society.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I want to assure you we've deployed the full resources of the FBI, the United States Secret Service,

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: and they're working very closely with law enforcement officials.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: We'll continue to monitor these investigations, and those responsible will be brought to justice.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Hey there, I'm Chris Hayes from MSNBC.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Thanks for watching MSNBC on YouTube.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: If you want to keep up to date with the videos we're putting out, you can click subscribe

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: just below me, or click over on this list to see lots of other great videos.
